title: Audio Guide release and operations map
description: Native Cloud Build tag releases, Cloud Run runtime secrets, smoke/prod split, and rollback path.

identityMatrix.responsibility: Build image, push Artifact Registry, deploy Cloud Run, write logs, act as runtime SA
Runtime identity that reads mounted Secret Manager secrets
Kept temporarily; removed in Phase 2 after Cloud Build prod is proven

releaseTimeline.action: Enable Cloud Build, Run, Artifact Registry, Secret Manager, and IAM APIs; create cloud-build-deployer.
Create or rotate four Secret Manager values and grant docker-pusher secretAccessor on each.
Push smoke-v* tag; Cloud Build deploys audioguide-ai-api-service-smoke; verify /health and smoke script.
Push v* semver tag through uv run bump --patch --release; Cloud Build deploys production service.
After prod is proven, remove fallback Cloud Run resources from Terraform state/code.

deployRisks.risk: Cloud Build GitHub app not connected
deployRisks.signal: Trigger creation fails or never receives tag events
deployRisks.mitigation: Connect repository through Cloud Build Repositories or follow gcloud prompt.
Use tag triggers or pass substitution manually.

deployRisks.signal: Cloud Run starts but secret files are unavailable
deployRisks.mitigation: Grant roles/secretmanager.secretAccessor to docker-pusher per secret.
Follow-up explicit boolean parsing before relying on prod auth assumptions.

deployRisks.signal: Terraform release path races Cloud Build
deployRisks.mitigation: Disable old infra workflow with gh immediately.

props.text: Deployment moved from repository-hosted release automation to native Cloud Build tag triggers. The image is built in Cloud Build, pushed to Artifact Registry, deployed to Cloud Run, and receives secrets only as runtime mounts.

props.label: Release event
props.caption: Cloud Build starts from tag push

props.title: Cloud Build release chain
props.description: The deployment unit is one container image. Build, push, and deploy happen in the Cloud Build pipeline.

props.title: Tag push → Cloud Run revision
props.caption: Smoke and prod share cloudbuild.yaml; substitutions decide the target service.

items.label: git
items.title: Push tag
items.description: smoke-v* for smoke or vX.Y.Z for production.

items.label: Cloud Build
items.title: Trigger matches
items.description: GitHub app hands source to Cloud Build with TAG_NAME.

items.label: docker
items.title: Build image
items.description: Docker BuildKit builds Dockerfile.api from clean context.

items.label: Artifact Registry
items.title: Push image
items.description: Image tag is ${TAG_NAME} in europe-west3 registry.

items.label: gcloud run deploy
items.title: Deploy service
items.description: Cloud Run gets env vars, service account, resources, and secret mounts.

items.label: smoke
items.title: Verify health
items.description: /health and uv run smoke confirm the target endpoint.

props.title: Canonical release commands
props.description: The operator path stays small; Cloud Build owns the heavy lift.

props.title: Smoke then prod
props.code:
git tag smoke-v0.0.1-$(date +%Y%m%d%H%M%S)
git push origin smoke-v0.0.1-20260601155613
AUDIOGUIDE_AUTH_TOKEN="<firebase-id-token>" uv run smoke --target smoke

uv run bump --patch --release
AUDIOGUIDE_AUTH_TOKEN="<firebase-id-token>" uv run smoke --target prod

props.title: Secrets and identity boundary
props.description: Secrets stop traveling through GitHub Actions or image layers. Cloud Run reads mounted files at runtime.

props.title: Migration and release lifecycle
props.description: The docs split the work into setup, smoke, prod, and later cleanup.

props.title: Risk ledger
props.description: Deployment is now cleaner, but these checks still matter before trusting prod.

props.title: Cloud Run rollback
props.code:
gcloud run revisions list \
  --service=audioguide-ai-api-service \
  --region=europe-west3 \
  --project=audioguide-ai-api

gcloud run services update-traffic audioguide-ai-api-service \
  --region=europe-west3 \
  --project=audioguide-ai-api \
  --to-revisions PREVIOUS_REVISION_NAME=100
